summary: Completed testing of CRM Mass Delete feature, Export CSV, and default page size. All backend API tests passed (11/11). All frontend UI tests passed - Mass Actions modal with Update/Delete tabs working correctly, delete confirmation requires 2-step process, default page size is 100, Export CSV button present.
critical_code_review_comments: Code implementation is solid - Mass Delete endpoint properly checks permissions before deletion
Export CSV correctly fetches all leads with limit=50000 to bypass pagination
Default page size correctly set to 100 in useState initialization
seed_data_creation: Created 3 test leads for mass delete testing (automatically cleaned up)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Mass Delete feature fully implemented and tested. Backend endpoint POST /api/crm/leads/mass-delete works correctly. Frontend Mass Actions modal has two tabs (Update/Delete), Delete tab shows warning and requires 2-step confirmation. Default page size is 100. Export CSV fetches all leads (up to 50000) matching current filters.

mass_delete_backend.details: POST /api/crm/leads/mass-delete endpoint works correctly, deletes multiple leads, returns deleted_count

mass_delete_frontend.details: Mass Actions modal has Update and Delete tabs, Delete tab shows warning, requires 2-step confirmation (Proceed to Delete -> Delete Forever)

default_page_size.details: Default page size is 100 as shown in 'Showing 1-100 / 1009' and Rows per page dropdown

export_csv.details: Export CSV button present, backend supports high limit (50000) for fetching all leads
